title: Goreyan Naal Lagdi Zameen Jatt Di
original_title: ਗੋਰੀਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਲੱਗਦੀ ਜ਼ਮੀਨ ਜੱਟ ਦੀ
overview: Two generations of Indiansvwith a love of working the land, and who are employed on a farm in the United Kingdom, learn to understand one another and overcome discrimination.
